hero.name: Bruno Ribeiro Pavaneli

about.title: Who I am
about.body: Full Stack developer focused on modern, scalable and well-structured web applications. I work across the JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem, front to back — from animated, accessible interfaces to APIs, databases and automated jobs. I care about writing clean code, thinking through the user experience, and shipping features with quality: tests, good practices and attention to detail. Currently studying Software Engineering and building real-world experience with modern stacks like Next.js 15, Fastify and PostgreSQL.

experience.title: Recent experience
backendItems: Anonymous submission system with automatic programming language detection
URL-safe unique identifier generation for public content sharing
Automatic data expiration routine after 24h using pg_cron and cascade delete

frontendItems: Global Error Boundary catching render and data-fetching exceptions
Animated illustration in pure SVG with multiple simultaneous animations
User-facing correlation ID for support without exposing internal details
WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility — role=alert, programmatic focus, keyboard navigation
Test coverage with Vitest + React Testing Library
